description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On January 15, 2025 at 1:12 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle ("Waymo AV") operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving an SUV on Stockton Street at Market Street. 
The Waymo AV was traveling southbound on Stockton Street, approaching the five-way series of intersections with Ellis Street, Market 
Street, and 4th Street in order to proceed on 4th Street. The Waymo AV proceeded straight past the intersection where Ellis Street intersects 
Stockton Street, with an SUV following behind. Then, the traffic light turned red before the Waymo AV began to cross Market Street. The 
Waymo AV began slowing to stop within the crosswalk along Market Street, and the front of the trailing SUV made contact with the rear of 
the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV's Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained 
damage.
Print
Clear Form
